name: Hillgrove Resources Limited
analysis: HGO's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 15% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.7× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.0520. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.0520, stop A$0.0441, target A$0.0575 (0.69:1) — then trail it.
